headline: Agentic SEO and autonomous output tooling moved to the center of the quarter as a cluster of data resilience techniques broke out.
body: Agent tooling dominated new activity: NotebookLM now writes code and builds sources autonomously, Claude Code wires into Search Console data to generate and deploy ranking content, and Gemma 4 26B ran 10 parallel subagents locally above 170 tokens per second under a single orchestrator. SEO and Apple Silicon optimization both broke out as tools, alongside a new entrant doer-judge framework and type checking. A distinct cluster of data resilience techniques (data backup, immutability, disaster recovery, ransomware protection) entered as new breakout entrants. Lagging momentum concentrated in established techniques including tool calling, privacy-preserving inference, and AI-assisted development.
